category_sources: Official GNU Parallel documentation describes running jobs in parallel and documents command-line options.
display_name_sources: Official GNU project page and documentation identify the project as GNU Parallel.
docs_sources: Official GNU Parallel page says the project includes Tutorial, How-To, Reference, and Design Discussion documentation.
Official GNU manual page provides command reference and reporting-bugs guidance.
repo_sources: Official GNU project page says development sources and project information are on the GNU Parallel Savannah project page.
Savannah is the official GNU project hosting referenced by source_facts.homepage.
tags_sources: Official documentation describes GNU Parallel job execution, profiles, SSH behavior, and command-line reference.
source_facts.executables lists parallel, sem, env_parallel, parsort, and related shell helpers.
